mapper.select: select * from upstream_system_connection where connection_code = #{connectionCode} limit 1
select coalesce(max(display_order), 0) from upstream_system_connection
mapper.insert: insert into upstream_system_connection( connection_code, system_kind, master_warehouse_name, settlement_type, app_key_mask, app_secret_mask, app_key_ciphertext, app_secret_ciphertext, credential_key_id, status, credential_status, enabled_capabilities, display_order, last_authorized_time, last_sync_time, request_log_count, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{connectionCode}, #{systemKind}, #{masterWarehouseName}, #{settlementType}, #{appKeyMask}, #{appSecretMask}, #{appKeyCiphertext}, #{appSecretCiphertext}, #{credentialKeyId}, #{status}, #{credentialStatus}, #{enabledCapabilities}, #{displayOrder}, #{lastAuthorizedTime}, #{lastSyncTime}, #{requestLogCount}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update upstream_system_connection set master_warehouse_name = #{masterWarehouseName}, settlement_type = #{settlementType}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where connection_code = #{connectionCode}

update upstream_system_connection set app_key_mask = #{appKeyMask}, app_secret_mask = #{appSecretMask}, app_key_ciphertext = #{appKeyCiphertext}, app_secret_ciphertext = #{appSecretCiphertext}, credential_key_id = #{credentialKeyId}, credential_status = #{credentialStatus}, last_authorized_time = #{lastAuthorizedTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where connection_code = #{connectionCode}

update upstream_system_connection set credential_status = #{credentialStatus}, last_authorized_time = #{lastAuthorizedTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where connection_code = #{connectionCode}
update upstream_system_connection set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where connection_code = #{connectionCode}
update upstream_system_connection set display_order = #{displayOrder}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where connection_code = #{connectionCode}

update upstream_system_connection c set c.last_sync_time = sysdate(), c.request_log_count = (select count(1) from upstream_system_request_log l where l.connection_code = #{connectionCode}), c.update_time = sysdate() where c.connection_code = #{connectionCode}
mapper.insert: insert into upstream_system_request_log( connection_code, trace_id, operation, endpoint, request_time, response_time, duration_ms, request_payload_redacted, response_payload_redacted, external_error_code, external_error_message, status, create_time ) values ( #{connectionCode}, #{traceId}, #{operation}, #{endpoint}, #{requestTime}, #{responseTime}, #{durationMs}, #{requestPayloadRedacted}, #{responsePayloadRedacted}, #{externalErrorCode}, #{externalErrorMessage}, #{status}, sysdate() )
mapper.select: select * from upstream_system_request_log where connection_code = #{connectionCode} order by create_time desc, request_log_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into upstream_system_sync_state( connection_code, sync_type, status, sync_batch_id, last_started_time, last_finished_time, last_success_time, next_sync_time, total_count, success_count, failed_count, last_error_code, last_error_message, last_mode, rate_limit_ms, update_time ) values ( #{connectionCode}, #{syncType}, #{status}, #{syncBatchId}, #{lastStartedTime}, #{lastFinishedTime}, #{lastSuccessTime}, #{nextSyncTime}, #{totalCount}, #{successCount}, #{failedCount}, #{lastErrorCode}, #{lastErrorMessage}, #{lastMode}, #{rateLimitMs}, sysdate() ) on duplicate key update status = values(status), sync_batch_id = values(sync_batch_id), last_started_time = values(last_started_time), last_finished_time = values(last_finished_time), last_success_time = coalesce(values(last_success_time), last_success_time), next_sync_time = values(next_sync_time), total_count = values(total_count), success_count = values(success_count), failed_count = values(failed_count), last_error_code = values(last_error_code), last_error_message = values(last_error_message), last_mode = values(last_mode), rate_limit_ms = values(rate_limit_ms), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select: select * from upstream_system_sync_state where connection_code = #{connectionCode} order by field(sync_type, 'WAREHOUSE', 'LOGISTICS_CHANNEL', 'SKU', 'SKU_DIMENSION', 'INVENTORY'), sync_type
mapper.insert: insert into upstream_system_sync_batch( sync_batch_id, connection_code, sync_type, mode, status, pulled_count, inserted_count, changed_count, unchanged_count, disabled_count, failed_count, started_time, finished_time, error_message ) values ( #{syncBatchId}, #{connectionCode}, #{syncType}, #{mode}, #{status}, coalesce(#{pulledCount}, 0), coalesce(#{insertedCount}, 0), coalesce(#{changedCount}, 0), coalesce(#{unchangedCount}, 0), coalesce(#{disabledCount}, 0), coalesce(#{failedCount}, 0), #{startedTime}, #{finishedTime}, #{errorMessage} ) on duplicate key update status = values(status), pulled_count = values(pulled_count), inserted_count = values(inserted_count), changed_count = values(changed_count), unchanged_count = values(unchanged_count), disabled_count = values(disabled_count), failed_count = values(failed_count), finished_time = values(finished_time), error_message = values(error_message)
mapper.update: update upstream_system_sync_batch set status = #{status}, pulled_count = coalesce(#{pulledCount}, 0), inserted_count = coalesce(#{insertedCount}, 0), changed_count = coalesce(#{changedCount}, 0), unchanged_count = coalesce(#{unchangedCount}, 0), disabled_count = coalesce(#{disabledCount}, 0), failed_count = coalesce(#{failedCount}, 0), finished_time = #{finishedTime}, error_message = #{errorMessage} where sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId}
mapper.insert:
insert into upstream_system_warehouse_candidate_stage( connection_code, sync_batch_id, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, country_code, source_payload_json, source_payload_hash, create_time ) values
( #{item.connectionCode}, #{item.syncBatchId}, #{item.warehouseCode}, #{item.warehouseName}, #{item.countryCode}, #{item.sourcePayloadJson}, #{item.sourcePayloadHash}, sysdate() )
on duplicate key update warehouse_name = values(warehouse_name), country_code = values(country_code), source_payload_json = values(source_payload_json), source_payload_hash = values(source_payload_hash), create_time = sysdate()

insert into upstream_system_warehouse_candidate( connection_code, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, country_code, status, source_payload_json, source_payload_hash, sync_batch_id, first_seen_time, last_seen_time, update_time ) select s.connection_code, s.warehouse_code, s.warehouse_name, s.country_code, 'ACTIVE', s.source_payload_json, s.source_payload_hash, s.sync_batch_id, sysdate(), sysdate(), sysdate() from upstream_system_warehouse_candidate_stage s left join upstream_system_warehouse_candidate c on c.connection_code = s.connection_code and c.warehouse_code = s.warehouse_code where s.connection_code = #{connectionCode} and s.sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId} and c.connection_code is null
mapper.update: update upstream_system_warehouse_candidate c inner join upstream_system_warehouse_candidate_stage s on s.connection_code = c.connection_code and s.warehouse_code = c.warehouse_code and s.sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId} set c.warehouse_name = s.warehouse_name, c.country_code = s.country_code, c.status = 'ACTIVE', c.source_payload_json = s.source_payload_json, c.source_payload_hash = s.source_payload_hash, c.sync_batch_id = s.sync_batch_id, c.last_seen_time = sysdate(), c.update_time = sysdate() where c.connection_code = #{connectionCode} and coalesce(c.source_payload_hash, '') <> coalesce(s.source_payload_hash, '')

update upstream_system_warehouse_candidate c inner join upstream_system_warehouse_candidate_stage s on s.connection_code = c.connection_code and s.warehouse_code = c.warehouse_code and s.sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId} set c.status = 'ACTIVE', c.sync_batch_id = s.sync_batch_id, c.last_seen_time = sysdate() where c.connection_code = #{connectionCode} and coalesce(c.source_payload_hash, '') = coalesce(s.source_payload_hash, '')

update upstream_system_warehouse_candidate c left join upstream_system_warehouse_candidate_stage s on s.connection_code = c.connection_code and s.warehouse_code = c.warehouse_code and s.sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId} set c.status = 'DISABLED', c.update_time = sysdate() where c.connection_code = #{connectionCode} and s.warehouse_code is null and c.status <> 'DISABLED'
mapper.insert: insert into upstream_system_warehouse_candidate( connection_code, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, country_code, status, source_payload_json, source_payload_hash, sync_batch_id, first_seen_time, last_seen_time, update_time ) values ( #{connectionCode}, #{warehouseCode}, #{warehouseName}, #{countryCode}, #{status}, #{sourcePayloadJson}, #{sourcePayloadHash}, #{syncBatchId}, sysdate(), sysdate(), sysdate() ) on duplicate key update warehouse_name = values(warehouse_name), country_code = values(country_code), status = values(status), source_payload_json = values(source_payload_json), source_payload_hash = values(source_payload_hash), sync_batch_id = values(sync_batch_id), last_seen_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select: select * from upstream_system_warehouse_pairing where connection_code = #{connectionCode} order by create_time desc, warehouse_pairing_id desc

update upstream_system_logistics_channel_candidate c inner join upstream_system_logistics_channel_candidate_stage s on s.connection_code = c.connection_code and s.warehouse_code = c.warehouse_code and s.channel_code = c.channel_code and s.sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId} set c.status = 'ACTIVE', c.sync_batch_id = s.sync_batch_id, c.last_seen_time = sysdate() where c.connection_code = #{connectionCode} and coalesce(c.source_payload_hash, '') = coalesce(s.source_payload_hash, '')

insert into upstream_system_sku_dimension_stage( connection_code, sync_batch_id, master_sku, master_product_name, wms_height, wms_height_bs, wms_length, wms_length_bs, wms_weight, wms_weight_bs, wms_width, wms_width_bs, source_payload_json, source_payload_hash, create_time ) values
( #{item.connectionCode}, #{item.syncBatchId}, #{item.masterSku}, #{item.masterProductName}, #{item.wmsHeight}, #{item.wmsHeightBs}, #{item.wmsLength}, #{item.wmsLengthBs}, #{item.wmsWeight}, #{item.wmsWeightBs}, #{item.wmsWidth}, #{item.wmsWidthBs}, #{item.sourcePayloadJson}, #{item.sourcePayloadHash}, sysdate() )

insert into upstream_system_sku_candidate( connection_code, master_sku, master_product_name, wms_height, wms_height_bs, wms_length, wms_length_bs, wms_weight, wms_weight_bs, wms_width, wms_width_bs, wms_payload_json, wms_payload_hash, source_payload_hash, status, search_text, sync_batch_id, first_seen_time, last_seen_time, update_time ) select s.connection_code, s.master_sku, coalesce(nullif(s.master_product_name, ''), s.master_sku), s.wms_height, s.wms_height_bs, s.wms_length, s.wms_length_bs, s.wms_weight, s.wms_weight_bs, s.wms_width, s.wms_width_bs, s.source_payload_json, s.source_payload_hash, '', 'ACTIVE', concat_ws(' ', s.master_sku, s.master_product_name), s.sync_batch_id, sysdate(), sysdate(), sysdate() from upstream_system_sku_dimension_stage s left join upstream_system_sku_candidate c on c.connection_code = s.connection_code and c.master_sku = s.master_sku where s.connection_code = #{connectionCode} and s.sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId} and c.connection_code is null
mapper.update: update upstream_system_sku_candidate c inner join upstream_system_sku_dimension_stage s on s.connection_code = c.connection_code and s.master_sku = c.master_sku and s.sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId} set c.master_product_name = coalesce(nullif(c.master_product_name, ''), s.master_product_name), c.wms_height = s.wms_height, c.wms_height_bs = s.wms_height_bs, c.wms_length = s.wms_length, c.wms_length_bs = s.wms_length_bs, c.wms_weight = s.wms_weight, c.wms_weight_bs = s.wms_weight_bs, c.wms_width = s.wms_width, c.wms_width_bs = s.wms_width_bs, c.wms_payload_json = s.source_payload_json, c.wms_payload_hash = s.source_payload_hash, c.status = 'ACTIVE', c.last_seen_time = sysdate(), c.update_time = sysdate() where c.connection_code = #{connectionCode} and coalesce(c.wms_payload_hash, '') <> coalesce(s.source_payload_hash, '')

update upstream_system_sku_candidate c inner join upstream_system_sku_dimension_stage s on s.connection_code = c.connection_code and s.master_sku = c.master_sku and s.sync_batch_id = #{syncBatchId} set c.status = 'ACTIVE', c.last_seen_time = sysdate() where c.connection_code = #{connectionCode} and coalesce(c.wms_payload_hash, '') = coalesce(s.source_payload_hash, '')
mapper.select:
select c.*, case when p.sku_pairing_id is null then 'UNASSIGNED' else 'PAIRED' end as pairing_status, p.sku_pairing_id, p.system_sku, p.system_sku_name, p.customer_name from upstream_system_sku_candidate c left join upstream_system_sku_pairing p on p.connection_code = c.connection_code and p.master_sku = c.master_sku where c.connection_code = #{connectionCode}
and c.status = #{status}
and p.sku_pairing_id is not null
and p.sku_pairing_id is null
and c.wms_length is not null and c.wms_width is not null and c.wms_height is not null and c.wms_weight is not null
and c.wms_length is null and c.wms_width is null and c.wms_height is null and c.wms_weight is null
and ( c.wms_length is not null or c.wms_width is not null or c.wms_height is not null or c.wms_weight is not null ) and ( c.wms_length is null or c.wms_width is null or c.wms_height is null or c.wms_weight is null )
and c.master_sku like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and c.master_product_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and p.system_sku like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and p.customer_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and ( c.search_text like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.system_sku like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.system_sku_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.customer_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
order by c.update_time desc, c.master_sku asc
mapper.sql: concat( 'OFFICIAL_MASTER:', sha2( concat( 'OFFICIAL_MASTER|', char_length(trim(coalesce(c.master_sku, ''))), ':', trim(coalesce(c.master_sku, '')), '|', char_length(trim(coalesce(c.master_product_name, ''))), ':', trim(coalesce(c.master_product_name, '')) ), 256 ) )

concat( , ':', sha2( concat_ws('|', coalesce(cast(c.product_length as char), 'NULL'), coalesce(cast(c.product_width as char), 'NULL'), coalesce(cast(c.product_height as char), 'NULL'), coalesce(cast(c.product_weight as char), 'NULL'), coalesce(cast(c.wms_length as char), 'NULL'), coalesce(cast(c.wms_width as char), 'NULL'), coalesce(cast(c.wms_height as char), 'NULL'), coalesce(cast(c.wms_weight as char), 'NULL') ), 256 ) )
mapper.select: select count(1) from source_product_dimension_group d

select ( select min(wd.connection_code) from source_product_warehouse_detail wd where wd.source_dimension_group_key = d.source_dimension_group_key ) as connection_code, d.source_sku_group_key, d.source_dimension_group_key, d.source_dimension_group_key as source_group_key, d.system_kind, d.master_warehouse_name, d.source_connection_codes, d.source_warehouse_names, d.warehouse_count, d.source_row_count, d.master_sku, d.master_product_name, d.product_alias_name, d.approve_status, d.product_type, d.product_description, d.image_url, d.main_code, d.other_code, d.fnsku, d.country_of_origin_name, d.currency_code, d.customhouse_code, d.dangerous_cargo, d.declare_name_cn, d.declare_name_en, d.declare_price, d.product_height, d.product_height_bs, d.product_length, d.product_length_bs, d.product_weight, d.product_weight_bs, d.product_width, d.product_width_bs, d.wms_height, d.wms_height_bs, d.wms_length, d.wms_length_bs, d.wms_weight, d.wms_weight_bs, d.wms_width, d.wms_width_bs, d.cat1_name, d.cat2_name, d.cat3_name, d.platform_sku_info_json, d.brazil_tax_info_json, d.source_payload_hash, d.status, d.search_text, d.sync_batch_id, d.first_seen_time, d.last_seen_time, d.update_time, d.pairing_status, d.sku_pairing_id, d.system_sku, d.system_sku_name, d.customer_name from source_product_dimension_group d
order by d.update_time desc, d.source_dimension_group_key asc

select ( select min(wd.connection_code) from source_product_warehouse_detail wd where wd.source_sku_group_key = g.source_sku_group_key ) as connection_code, g.source_sku_group_key, g.source_sku_group_key as source_dimension_group_key, g.source_sku_group_key as source_group_key, g.system_kind, g.source_warehouse_names as master_warehouse_name, g.source_connection_codes, g.source_warehouse_names, g.warehouse_count, g.source_row_count, g.master_sku, g.master_product_name, g.status, g.search_text, g.latest_update_time as update_time, g.pairing_status from source_product_group g where g.repository_scope = #{repositoryScope} and g.source_sku_group_key = #{sourceSkuGroupKey} limit 1

select w.connection_code, w.source_sku_group_key, w.source_dimension_group_key, w.source_dimension_group_key as source_group_key, w.system_kind, w.master_warehouse_name, w.connection_code as source_connection_codes, w.master_warehouse_name as source_warehouse_names, 1 as warehouse_count, 1 as source_row_count, w.master_sku, w.master_product_name, w.product_height, w.product_height_bs, w.product_length, w.product_length_bs, w.product_weight, w.product_weight_bs, w.product_width, w.product_width_bs, w.wms_height, w.wms_height_bs, w.wms_length, w.wms_length_bs, w.wms_weight, w.wms_weight_bs, w.wms_width, w.wms_width_bs, w.source_payload_hash, w.status, w.first_seen_time, w.last_seen_time, w.update_time, w.pairing_status, w.sku_pairing_id, w.system_sku, w.system_sku_name, w.customer_name from source_product_warehouse_detail w where w.repository_scope = #{repositoryScope} and w.source_sku_group_key = #{sourceSkuGroupKey} order by w.master_warehouse_name asc, w.connection_code asc

mapper.sql:
insert into source_product_group( source_sku_group_key, repository_scope, master_sku, master_product_name, system_kind, source_connection_codes, source_warehouse_names, warehouse_count, source_row_count, pairing_status, status, latest_update_time, search_text, rebuild_time ) select as source_sku_group_key, 'OFFICIAL_MASTER' as repository_scope, c.master_sku, c.master_product_name, max(case when conn.system_kind = 'LINGXING_WMS' then 'lingxing-wms' else conn.system_kind end) as system_kind, coalesce(group_concat(distinct c.connection_code order by c.connection_code separator ','), '') as source_connection_codes, coalesce(group_concat(distinct conn.master_warehouse_name order by conn.master_warehouse_name separator ' / '), '') as source_warehouse_names, count(distinct c.connection_code) as warehouse_count, count(1) as source_row_count, case when sum(case when p.sku_pairing_id is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then 'UNASSIGNED' when sum(case when p.sku_pairing_id is not null then 1 else 0 end) = count(1) then 'PAIRED' else 'PARTIAL' end as pairing_status, case when count(distinct c.status) = 1 then max(c.status) else 'MIXED' end as status, max(c.update_time) as latest_update_time, concat_ws(' ', c.master_sku, c.master_product_name, coalesce(group_concat(distinct conn.master_warehouse_name separator ' '), ''), coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(p.system_sku, '') separator ' '), ''), coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(p.system_sku_name, '') separator ' '), ''), coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(p.customer_name, '') separator ' '), ''), coalesce(max(c.search_text), '') ) as search_text, sysdate() as rebuild_time from upstream_system_sku_candidate c inner join upstream_system_connection conn on conn.connection_code = c.connection_code left join upstream_system_sku_pairing p on p.connection_code = c.connection_code and p.master_sku = c.master_sku
group by c.master_sku, c.master_product_name on duplicate key update system_kind = values(system_kind), source_connection_codes = values(source_connection_codes), source_warehouse_names = values(source_warehouse_names), warehouse_count = values(warehouse_count), source_row_count = values(source_row_count), pairing_status = values(pairing_status), status = values(status), latest_update_time = values(latest_update_time), search_text = values(search_text), rebuild_time = values(rebuild_time)

system_sku, system_sku_name, customer_name, rebuild_time ) select as source_dimension_group_key, as source_sku_group_key, 'OFFICIAL_MASTER' as repository_scope, max(case when conn.system_kind = 'LINGXING_WMS' then 'lingxing-wms' else conn.system_kind end) as system_kind, coalesce(group_concat(distinct c.connection_code order by c.connection_code separator ','), '') as source_connection_codes, coalesce(group_concat(distinct conn.master_warehouse_name order by conn.master_warehouse_name separator ' / '), '') as source_warehouse_names, coalesce(group_concat(distinct conn.master_warehouse_name order by conn.master_warehouse_name separator ' / '), '') as master_warehouse_name, count(distinct c.connection_code) as warehouse_count, count(1) as source_row_count, c.master_sku, c.master_product_name, max(c.product_alias_name) as product_alias_name, max(c.approve_status) as approve_status, max(c.product_type) as product_type, max(c.product_description) as product_description, max(c.image_url) as image_url, max(c.main_code) as main_code, max(c.other_code) as other_code, max(c.fnsku) as fnsku, max(c.country_of_origin_name) as country_of_origin_name, max(c.currency_code) as currency_code, max(c.customhouse_code) as customhouse_code, max(c.dangerous_cargo) as dangerous_cargo, max(c.declare_name_cn) as declare_name_cn, max(c.declare_name_en) as declare_name_en, max(c.declare_price) as declare_price, c.product_height, max(c.product_height_bs) as product_height_bs, c.product_length, max(c.product_length_bs) as product_length_bs, c.product_weight, max(c.product_weight_bs) as product_weight_bs, c.product_width, max(c.product_width_bs) as product_width_bs, c.wms_height, max(c.wms_height_bs) as wms_height_bs, c.wms_length, max(c.wms_length_bs) as wms_length_bs, c.wms_weight, max(c.wms_weight_bs) as wms_weight_bs, c.wms_width, max(c.wms_width_bs) as wms_width_bs, max(c.cat1_name) as cat1_name, max(c.cat2_name) as cat2_name, max(c.cat3_name) as cat3_name, max(c.platform_sku_info_json) as platform_sku_info_json, max(c.brazil_tax_info_json) as brazil_tax_info_json, max(c.source_payload_hash) as source_payload_hash, case when count(distinct c.status) = 1 then max(c.status) else 'MIXED' end as status, concat_ws(' ', c.master_sku, c.master_product_name, coalesce(group_concat(distinct c.connection_code separator ' '), ''), coalesce(group_concat(distinct conn.master_warehouse_name separator ' '), ''), coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(p.system_sku, '') separator ' '), ''), coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(p.system_sku_name, '') separator ' '), ''), coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(p.customer_name, '') separator ' '), ''), coalesce(max(c.search_text), '') ) as search_text, max(c.sync_batch_id) as sync_batch_id, min(c.first_seen_time) as first_seen_time, max(c.last_seen_time) as last_seen_time, max(c.update_time) as update_time, case when sum(case when p.sku_pairing_id is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then 'UNASSIGNED' when sum(case when p.sku_pairing_id is not null then 1 else 0 end) = count(1) then 'PAIRED' else 'PARTIAL' end as pairing_status, max(p.sku_pairing_id) as sku_pairing_id, coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(p.system_sku, '') order by p.system_sku separator ' / '), '') as system_sku, coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(p.system_sku_name, '') order by p.system_sku_name separator ' / '), '') as system_sku_name, coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(p.customer_name, '') order by p.customer_name separator ' / '), '') as customer_name, sysdate() as rebuild_time from upstream_system_sku_candidate c inner join upstream_system_connection conn on conn.connection_code = c.connection_code left join upstream_system_sku_pairing p on p.connection_code = c.connection_code and p.master_sku = c.master_sku
group by c.master_sku, c.master_product_name, c.product_length, c.product_width, c.product_height, c.product_weight, c.wms_length, c.wms_width, c.wms_height, c.wms_weight on duplicate key update values(pairing_status), sku_pairing_id = values(sku_pairing_id), system_sku = values(system_sku), system_sku_name = values(system_sku_name), customer_name = values(customer_name), rebuild_time = values(rebuild_time)

insert into source_product_warehouse_detail( source_sku_group_key, source_dimension_group_key, repository_scope, connection_code, master_warehouse_name, system_kind, master_sku, master_product_name, product_height, product_height_bs, product_length, product_length_bs, product_weight, product_weight_bs, product_width, product_width_bs, wms_height, wms_height_bs, wms_length, wms_length_bs, wms_weight, wms_weight_bs, wms_width, wms_width_bs, status, pairing_status, sku_pairing_id, system_sku, system_sku_name, customer_name, source_payload_hash, wms_payload_hash, first_seen_time, last_seen_time, update_time, rebuild_time ) select as source_sku_group_key, as source_dimension_group_key, 'OFFICIAL_MASTER' as repository_scope, c.connection_code, conn.master_warehouse_name, case when conn.system_kind = 'LINGXING_WMS' then 'lingxing-wms' else conn.system_kind end as system_kind, c.master_sku, c.master_product_name, c.product_height, c.product_height_bs, c.product_length, c.product_length_bs, c.product_weight, c.product_weight_bs, c.product_width, c.product_width_bs, c.wms_height, c.wms_height_bs, c.wms_length, c.wms_length_bs, c.wms_weight, c.wms_weight_bs, c.wms_width, c.wms_width_bs, c.status, case when p.sku_pairing_id is null then 'UNASSIGNED' else 'PAIRED' end as pairing_status, p.sku_pairing_id, p.system_sku, p.system_sku_name, p.customer_name, c.source_payload_hash, c.wms_payload_hash, c.first_seen_time, c.last_seen_time, c.update_time, sysdate() as rebuild_time from upstream_system_sku_candidate c inner join upstream_system_connection conn on conn.connection_code = c.connection_code left join upstream_system_sku_pairing p on p.connection_code = c.connection_code and p.master_sku = c.master_sku
on duplicate key update source_sku_group_key = values(source_sku_group_key), source_dimension_group_key = values(source_dimension_group_key), master_warehouse_name = values(master_warehouse_name), system_kind = values(system_kind), master_product_name = values(master_product_name), product_height = values(product_height), product_height_bs = values(product_height_bs), product_length = values(product_length), product_length_bs = values(product_length_bs), product_weight = values(product_weight), product_weight_bs = values(product_weight_bs), product_width = values(product_width), product_width_bs = values(product_width_bs), wms_height = values(wms_height), wms_height_bs = values(wms_height_bs), wms_length = values(wms_length), wms_length_bs = values(wms_length_bs), wms_weight = values(wms_weight), wms_weight_bs = values(wms_weight_bs), wms_width = values(wms_width), wms_width_bs = values(wms_width_bs), status = values(status), pairing_status = values(pairing_status), sku_pairing_id = values(sku_pairing_id), system_sku = values(system_sku), system_sku_name = values(system_sku_name), customer_name = values(customer_name), source_payload_hash = values(source_payload_hash), wms_payload_hash = values(wms_payload_hash), first_seen_time = values(first_seen_time), last_seen_time = values(last_seen_time), update_time = values(update_time), rebuild_time = values(rebuild_time)

concat( 'SOURCE_STOCK:', sha2( concat( 'OFFICIAL_MASTER|', coalesce(s.inventory_scope, ''), '|', char_length(trim(coalesce(s.master_sku, ''))), ':', trim(coalesce(s.master_sku, '')), '|', char_length(trim(coalesce(s.master_product_name, ''))), ':', trim(coalesce(s.master_product_name, '')) ), 256 ) )
mapper.select: select count(1) from source_warehouse_stock_group g

select g.* from source_warehouse_stock_group g
order by g.latest_update_time desc, g.source_stock_group_key asc

select distinct wd.source_dimension_group_key, w.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_code, w.warehouse_name, w.warehouse_kind, w.settlement_currency from source_product_warehouse_detail wd inner join upstream_system_connection c on c.connection_code = wd.connection_code inner join upstream_system_warehouse_pairing p on p.connection_code = wd.connection_code and p.pairing_role = case when c.settlement_type = 'self-operated-receivable' then 'QUOTE' else 'FULFILLMENT' end and p.status = 'ACTIVE' inner join warehouse w on w.warehouse_code = p.system_warehouse_code and w.warehouse_kind = 'official' and w.status = '0' where wd.repository_scope = 'OFFICIAL_MASTER' and wd.status = 'ACTIVE' and wd.source_dimension_group_key = #{sourceDimensionGroupKey} order by w.warehouse_id asc

select d.repository_scope as source_scope, d.source_sku_group_key, d.source_dimension_group_key, d.master_sku, d.master_product_name as master_product_name_snapshot, d.source_payload_hash, coalesce(wd.wms_payload_hash, '') as wms_payload_hash, case when d.wms_length is not null and d.wms_width is not null and d.wms_height is not null and d.wms_weight is not null then d.wms_length else d.product_length end as measure_length_cm, case when d.wms_length is not null and d.wms_width is not null and d.wms_height is not null and d.wms_weight is not null then d.wms_width else d.product_width end as measure_width_cm, case when d.wms_length is not null and d.wms_width is not null and d.wms_height is not null and d.wms_weight is not null then d.wms_height else d.product_height end as measure_height_cm, case when d.wms_length is not null and d.wms_width is not null and d.wms_height is not null and d.wms_weight is not null then d.wms_weight else d.product_weight end as measure_weight_kg, case when d.wms_length is not null and d.wms_width is not null and d.wms_height is not null and d.wms_weight is not null then 'WMS' else 'PRODUCT' end as measure_source, d.currency_code, d.source_warehouse_names, d.warehouse_count as source_warehouse_count from source_product_dimension_group d left join ( select source_dimension_group_key, max(coalesce(wms_payload_hash, '')) as wms_payload_hash from source_product_warehouse_detail where repository_scope = 'OFFICIAL_MASTER' group by source_dimension_group_key ) wd on wd.source_dimension_group_key = d.source_dimension_group_key where d.repository_scope = 'OFFICIAL_MASTER' and d.status = 'ACTIVE' and d.source_dimension_group_key = #{sourceDimensionGroupKey} limit 1

select distinct connection_code from source_product_warehouse_detail where repository_scope = 'OFFICIAL_MASTER' and source_dimension_group_key = #{sourceDimensionGroupKey} order by connection_code asc
mapper.insert: insert into upstream_system_sku_pairing( connection_code, master_sku, system_sku, system_sku_name, customer_name, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) select distinct wd.connection_code, wd.master_sku, #{systemSkuCode}, #{systemSkuName}, #{sellerName}, #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), '商城商品来源SKU绑定同步' from source_product_warehouse_detail wd where wd.repository_scope = 'OFFICIAL_MASTER' and wd.status = 'ACTIVE' and wd.source_dimension_group_key = #{sourceDimensionGroupKey} on duplicate key update system_sku = values(system_sku), system_sku_name = values(system_sku_name), customer_name = values(customer_name), update_by = values(update_by), update_time = sysdate(), remark = values(remark)

insert into source_warehouse_stock_detail( inventory_snapshot_id, source_stock_group_key, repository_scope, connection_code, system_kind, master_warehouse_name, upstream_warehouse_code, upstream_warehouse_name, master_sku, master_product_name, inventory_scope, inventory_attribute, inventory_attribute_label, batch_no, location_code, total_quantity, available_quantity, locked_quantity, in_transit_quantity, boxed_quantity, unboxed_quantity, system_warehouse_code, system_warehouse_name, system_sku, system_sku_name, customer_name, warehouse_pairing_status, sku_pairing_status, status, sync_batch_id, source_payload_hash, first_seen_time, last_seen_time, update_time, rebuild_time ) select s.inventory_snapshot_id, as source_stock_group_key, 'OFFICIAL_MASTER' as repository_scope, s.connection_code, case when c.system_kind = 'LINGXING_WMS' then 'lingxing-wms' else coalesce(c.system_kind, '') end as system_kind, coalesce(c.master_warehouse_name, '') as master_warehouse_name, s.upstream_warehouse_code, coalesce(s.upstream_warehouse_name, '') as upstream_warehouse_name, s.master_sku, coalesce(s.master_product_name, '') as master_product_name, s.inventory_scope, s.inventory_attribute, case when s.inventory_attribute = '0' then '正品' when s.inventory_attribute = '1' then '次品' when nullif(s.inventory_attribute, '') is null then '' else s.inventory_attribute end as inventory_attribute_label, s.batch_no, s.location_code, s.total_quantity, s.available_quantity, s.locked_quantity, s.in_transit_quantity, s.boxed_quantity, s.unboxed_quantity, coalesce(s.system_warehouse_code, '') as system_warehouse_code, coalesce(s.system_warehouse_name, '') as system_warehouse_name, coalesce(s.system_sku, '') as system_sku, coalesce(s.system_sku_name, '') as system_sku_name, coalesce(s.customer_name, '') as customer_name, case when nullif(s.system_warehouse_code, '') is null then 'UNASSIGNED' else 'PAIRED' end as warehouse_pairing_status, case when nullif(s.system_sku, '') is null then 'UNASSIGNED' else 'PAIRED' end as sku_pairing_status, s.status, s.sync_batch_id, coalesce(s.source_payload_hash, '') as source_payload_hash, s.first_seen_time, s.last_seen_time, s.update_time, sysdate() as rebuild_time from upstream_system_sku_inventory_snapshot s left join upstream_system_connection c on c.connection_code = s.connection_code
on duplicate key update source_stock_group_key = values(source_stock_group_key), system_kind = values(system_kind), master_warehouse_name = values(master_warehouse_name), upstream_warehouse_name = values(upstream_warehouse_name), master_product_name = values(master_product_name), inventory_scope = values(inventory_scope), inventory_attribute = values(inventory_attribute), inventory_attribute_label = values(inventory_attribute_label), batch_no = values(batch_no), location_code = values(location_code), total_quantity = values(total_quantity), available_quantity = values(available_quantity), locked_quantity = values(locked_quantity), in_transit_quantity = values(in_transit_quantity), boxed_quantity = values(boxed_quantity), unboxed_quantity = values(unboxed_quantity), system_warehouse_code = values(system_warehouse_code), system_warehouse_name = values(system_warehouse_name), system_sku = values(system_sku), system_sku_name = values(system_sku_name), customer_name = values(customer_name), warehouse_pairing_status = values(warehouse_pairing_status), sku_pairing_status = values(sku_pairing_status), status = values(status), sync_batch_id = values(sync_batch_id), source_payload_hash = values(source_payload_hash), first_seen_time = values(first_seen_time), last_seen_time = values(last_seen_time), update_time = values(update_time), rebuild_time = values(rebuild_time)

insert into source_warehouse_stock_group( source_stock_group_key, repository_scope, inventory_scope, master_sku, master_product_name, inventory_attribute_codes, inventory_attribute_labels, inventory_attribute_count, source_connection_codes, master_warehouse_names, master_warehouse_count, upstream_warehouse_codes, upstream_warehouse_names, upstream_warehouse_count, detail_row_count, active_detail_count, missing_detail_count, total_quantity, available_quantity, locked_quantity, in_transit_quantity, boxed_quantity, unboxed_quantity, system_warehouse_codes, system_warehouse_names, system_skus, system_sku_names, customer_names, warehouse_pairing_status, sku_pairing_status, status, latest_sync_batch_id, first_seen_time, last_seen_time, latest_update_time, search_text, rebuild_time ) select d.source_stock_group_key, max(d.repository_scope) as repository_scope, max(d.inventory_scope) as inventory_scope, max(d.master_sku) as master_sku, max(d.master_product_name) as master_product_name, coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(d.inventory_attribute, '') order by d.inventory_attribute separator ','), '') as inventory_attribute_codes, coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(d.inventory_attribute_label, '') order by d.inventory_attribute_label separator ' / '), '') as inventory_attribute_labels, count(distinct nullif(d.inventory_attribute, '')) as inventory_attribute_count, coalesce(group_concat(distinct d.connection_code order by d.connection_code separator ','), '') as source_connection_codes, coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(d.master_warehouse_name, '') order by d.master_warehouse_name separator ' / '), '') as master_warehouse_names, count(distinct nullif(d.master_warehouse_name, '')) as master_warehouse_count, coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(d.upstream_warehouse_code, '') order by d.upstream_warehouse_code separator ','), '') as upstream_warehouse_codes, coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(d.upstream_warehouse_name, '') order by d.upstream_warehouse_name separator ' / '), '') as upstream_warehouse_names, count(distinct nullif(d.upstream_warehouse_code, '')) as upstream_warehouse_count, count(1) as detail_row_count, sum(case when d.status = 'ACTIVE' then 1 else 0 end) as active_detail_count, sum(case when d.status = 'MISSING' then 1 else 0 end) as missing_detail_count, sum(coalesce(d.total_quantity, 0)) as total_quantity, sum(coalesce(d.available_quantity, 0)) as available_quantity, sum(coalesce(d.locked_quantity, 0)) as locked_quantity, sum(coalesce(d.in_transit_quantity, 0)) as in_transit_quantity, case when sum(case when d.boxed_quantity is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then null else sum(coalesce(d.boxed_quantity, 0)) end as boxed_quantity, case when sum(case when d.unboxed_quantity is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then null else sum(coalesce(d.unboxed_quantity, 0)) end as unboxed_quantity, coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(d.system_warehouse_code, '') order by d.system_warehouse_code separator ','), '') as system_warehouse_codes, coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(d.system_warehouse_name, '') order by d.system_warehouse_name separator ' / '), '') as system_warehouse_names, coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(d.system_sku, '') order by d.system_sku separator ' / '), '') as system_skus, coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(d.system_sku_name, '') order by d.system_sku_name separator ' / '), '') as system_sku_names, coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(d.customer_name, '') order by d.customer_name separator ' / '), '') as customer_names, case when sum(case when d.warehouse_pairing_status = 'PAIRED' then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then 'UNASSIGNED' when sum(case when d.warehouse_pairing_status = 'PAIRED' then 1 else 0 end) = count(1) then 'PAIRED' else 'PARTIAL' end as warehouse_pairing_status, case when sum(case when d.sku_pairing_status = 'PAIRED' then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then 'UNASSIGNED' when sum(case when d.sku_pairing_status = 'PAIRED' then 1 else 0 end) = count(1) then 'PAIRED' else 'PARTIAL' end as sku_pairing_status, case when count(distinct d.status) = 1 then max(d.status) else 'MIXED' end as status, max(d.sync_batch_id) as latest_sync_batch_id, min(d.first_seen_time) as first_seen_time, max(d.last_seen_time) as last_seen_time, max(d.update_time) as latest_update_time, concat_ws(' ', max(d.master_sku), max(d.master_product_name), coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(d.master_warehouse_name, '') separator ' '), ''), coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(d.upstream_warehouse_code, '') separator ' '), ''), coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(d.upstream_warehouse_name, '') separator ' '), ''), coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(d.system_warehouse_code, '') separator ' '), ''), coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(d.system_warehouse_name, '') separator ' '), ''), coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(d.system_sku, '') separator ' '), ''), coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(d.system_sku_name, '') separator ' '), ''), coalesce(group_concat(distinct nullif(d.customer_name, '') separator ' '), '') ) as search_text, sysdate() as rebuild_time from source_warehouse_stock_detail d
group by d.source_stock_group_key on duplicate key update inventory_attribute_codes = values(inventory_attribute_codes), inventory_attribute_labels = values(inventory_attribute_labels), inventory_attribute_count = values(inventory_attribute_count), source_connection_codes = values(source_connection_codes), master_warehouse_names = values(master_warehouse_names), master_warehouse_count = values(master_warehouse_count), upstream_warehouse_codes = values(upstream_warehouse_codes), upstream_warehouse_names = values(upstream_warehouse_names), upstream_warehouse_count = values(upstream_warehouse_count), detail_row_count = values(detail_row_count), active_detail_count = values(active_detail_count), missing_detail_count = values(missing_detail_count), total_quantity = values(total_quantity), available_quantity = values(available_quantity), locked_quantity = values(locked_quantity), in_transit_quantity = values(in_transit_quantity), boxed_quantity = values(boxed_quantity), unboxed_quantity = values(unboxed_quantity), system_warehouse_codes = values(system_warehouse_codes), system_warehouse_names = values(system_warehouse_names), system_skus = values(system_skus), system_sku_names = values(system_sku_names), customer_names = values(customer_names), warehouse_pairing_status = values(warehouse_pairing_status), sku_pairing_status = values(sku_pairing_status), status = values(status), latest_sync_batch_id = values(latest_sync_batch_id), first_seen_time = values(first_seen_time), last_seen_time = values(last_seen_time), latest_update_time = values(latest_update_time), search_text = values(search_text), rebuild_time = values(rebuild_time)

insert into source_warehouse_stock_filter_metric( metric_key, source_stock_group_key, repository_scope, inventory_scope, filter_type, filter_value, filter_label, detail_row_count, total_quantity, available_quantity, locked_quantity, in_transit_quantity, boxed_quantity, unboxed_quantity, latest_update_time, rebuild_time ) select concat('SOURCE_STOCK_METRIC:', sha2(concat(m.source_stock_group_key, '|', m.filter_type, '|', m.filter_value), 256)) as metric_key, m.source_stock_group_key, m.repository_scope, m.inventory_scope, m.filter_type, m.filter_value, m.filter_label, m.detail_row_count, m.total_quantity, m.available_quantity, m.locked_quantity, m.in_transit_quantity, m.boxed_quantity, m.unboxed_quantity, m.latest_update_time, sysdate() as rebuild_time from ( select d.source_stock_group_key, max(d.repository_scope) as repository_scope, max(d.inventory_scope) as inventory_scope, 'INVENTORY_ATTRIBUTE' as filter_type, d.inventory_attribute as filter_value, max(d.inventory_attribute_label) as filter_label, count(1) as detail_row_count, sum(coalesce(d.total_quantity, 0)) as total_quantity, sum(coalesce(d.available_quantity, 0)) as available_quantity, sum(coalesce(d.locked_quantity, 0)) as locked_quantity, sum(coalesce(d.in_transit_quantity, 0)) as in_transit_quantity, case when sum(case when d.boxed_quantity is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then null else sum(coalesce(d.boxed_quantity, 0)) end as boxed_quantity, case when sum(case when d.unboxed_quantity is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then null else sum(coalesce(d.unboxed_quantity, 0)) end as unboxed_quantity, max(d.update_time) as latest_update_time from source_warehouse_stock_detail d
and nullif(d.inventory_attribute, '') is not null group by d.source_stock_group_key, d.inventory_attribute union all select d.source_stock_group_key, max(d.repository_scope), max(d.inventory_scope), 'MASTER_WAREHOUSE', d.master_warehouse_name, d.master_warehouse_name, count(1), sum(coalesce(d.total_quantity, 0)), sum(coalesce(d.available_quantity, 0)), sum(coalesce(d.locked_quantity, 0)), sum(coalesce(d.in_transit_quantity, 0)), case when sum(case when d.boxed_quantity is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then null else sum(coalesce(d.boxed_quantity, 0)) end, case when sum(case when d.unboxed_quantity is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then null else sum(coalesce(d.unboxed_quantity, 0)) end, max(d.update_time) from source_warehouse_stock_detail d
and nullif(d.master_warehouse_name, '') is not null group by d.source_stock_group_key, d.master_warehouse_name union all select d.source_stock_group_key, max(d.repository_scope), max(d.inventory_scope), 'UPSTREAM_WAREHOUSE', d.upstream_warehouse_code, max(d.upstream_warehouse_name), count(1), sum(coalesce(d.total_quantity, 0)), sum(coalesce(d.available_quantity, 0)), sum(coalesce(d.locked_quantity, 0)), sum(coalesce(d.in_transit_quantity, 0)), case when sum(case when d.boxed_quantity is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then null else sum(coalesce(d.boxed_quantity, 0)) end, case when sum(case when d.unboxed_quantity is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then null else sum(coalesce(d.unboxed_quantity, 0)) end, max(d.update_time) from source_warehouse_stock_detail d
and nullif(d.upstream_warehouse_code, '') is not null group by d.source_stock_group_key, d.upstream_warehouse_code union all select d.source_stock_group_key, max(d.repository_scope), max(d.inventory_scope), 'SYSTEM_WAREHOUSE', d.system_warehouse_code, max(d.system_warehouse_name), count(1), sum(coalesce(d.total_quantity, 0)), sum(coalesce(d.available_quantity, 0)), sum(coalesce(d.locked_quantity, 0)), sum(coalesce(d.in_transit_quantity, 0)), case when sum(case when d.boxed_quantity is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then null else sum(coalesce(d.boxed_quantity, 0)) end, case when sum(case when d.unboxed_quantity is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then null else sum(coalesce(d.unboxed_quantity, 0)) end, max(d.update_time) from source_warehouse_stock_detail d
and nullif(d.system_warehouse_code, '') is not null group by d.source_stock_group_key, d.system_warehouse_code union all select d.source_stock_group_key, max(d.repository_scope), max(d.inventory_scope), 'SYSTEM_SKU', d.system_sku, max(d.system_sku_name), count(1), sum(coalesce(d.total_quantity, 0)), sum(coalesce(d.available_quantity, 0)), sum(coalesce(d.locked_quantity, 0)), sum(coalesce(d.in_transit_quantity, 0)), case when sum(case when d.boxed_quantity is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then null else sum(coalesce(d.boxed_quantity, 0)) end, case when sum(case when d.unboxed_quantity is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then null else sum(coalesce(d.unboxed_quantity, 0)) end, max(d.update_time) from source_warehouse_stock_detail d
and nullif(d.system_sku, '') is not null group by d.source_stock_group_key, d.system_sku union all select d.source_stock_group_key, max(d.repository_scope), max(d.inventory_scope), 'CUSTOMER', d.customer_name, d.customer_name, count(1), sum(coalesce(d.total_quantity, 0)), sum(coalesce(d.available_quantity, 0)), sum(coalesce(d.locked_quantity, 0)), sum(coalesce(d.in_transit_quantity, 0)), case when sum(case when d.boxed_quantity is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then null else sum(coalesce(d.boxed_quantity, 0)) end, case when sum(case when d.unboxed_quantity is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then null else sum(coalesce(d.unboxed_quantity, 0)) end, max(d.update_time) from source_warehouse_stock_detail d
and nullif(d.customer_name, '') is not null group by d.source_stock_group_key, d.customer_name union all select d.source_stock_group_key, max(d.repository_scope), max(d.inventory_scope), 'STATUS', d.status, d.status, count(1), sum(coalesce(d.total_quantity, 0)), sum(coalesce(d.available_quantity, 0)), sum(coalesce(d.locked_quantity, 0)), sum(coalesce(d.in_transit_quantity, 0)), case when sum(case when d.boxed_quantity is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then null else sum(coalesce(d.boxed_quantity, 0)) end, case when sum(case when d.unboxed_quantity is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then null else sum(coalesce(d.unboxed_quantity, 0)) end, max(d.update_time) from source_warehouse_stock_detail d
group by d.source_stock_group_key, d.status union all select d.source_stock_group_key, max(d.repository_scope), max(d.inventory_scope), 'WAREHOUSE_PAIRING_STATUS', d.warehouse_pairing_status, d.warehouse_pairing_status, count(1), sum(coalesce(d.total_quantity, 0)), sum(coalesce(d.available_quantity, 0)), sum(coalesce(d.locked_quantity, 0)), sum(coalesce(d.in_transit_quantity, 0)), case when sum(case when d.boxed_quantity is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then null else sum(coalesce(d.boxed_quantity, 0)) end, case when sum(case when d.unboxed_quantity is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then null else sum(coalesce(d.unboxed_quantity, 0)) end, max(d.update_time) from source_warehouse_stock_detail d
group by d.source_stock_group_key, d.warehouse_pairing_status union all select d.source_stock_group_key, max(d.repository_scope), max(d.inventory_scope), 'SKU_PAIRING_STATUS', d.sku_pairing_status, d.sku_pairing_status, count(1), sum(coalesce(d.total_quantity, 0)), sum(coalesce(d.available_quantity, 0)), sum(coalesce(d.locked_quantity, 0)), sum(coalesce(d.in_transit_quantity, 0)), case when sum(case when d.boxed_quantity is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then null else sum(coalesce(d.boxed_quantity, 0)) end, case when sum(case when d.unboxed_quantity is not null then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then null else sum(coalesce(d.unboxed_quantity, 0)) end, max(d.update_time) from source_warehouse_stock_detail d
group by d.source_stock_group_key, d.sku_pairing_status ) m on duplicate key update repository_scope = values(repository_scope), inventory_scope = values(inventory_scope), filter_label = values(filter_label), detail_row_count = values(detail_row_count), total_quantity = values(total_quantity), available_quantity = values(available_quantity), locked_quantity = values(locked_quantity), in_transit_quantity = values(in_transit_quantity), boxed_quantity = values(boxed_quantity), unboxed_quantity = values(unboxed_quantity), latest_update_time = values(latest_update_time), rebuild_time = values(rebuild_time)

select distinct affected.source_scope, affected.master_sku, affected.master_product_name from ( select 'OFFICIAL_MASTER' as source_scope, s.master_sku, coalesce(s.master_product_name, '') as master_product_name from upstream_system_sku_inventory_snapshot s where s.connection_code = #{connectionCode} and nullif(s.master_sku, '') is not null union select g.repository_scope as source_scope, g.master_sku, coalesce(g.master_product_name, '') as master_product_name from source_warehouse_stock_group g where g.repository_scope = 'OFFICIAL_MASTER' and g.source_stock_group_key in (
) and nullif(g.master_sku, '') is not null ) affected order by affected.master_sku asc, affected.master_product_name asc
mapper.insert: insert into upstream_system_sku_inventory_snapshot( connection_code, upstream_warehouse_code, upstream_warehouse_name, master_sku, master_product_name, inventory_scope, inventory_attribute, batch_no, location_code, total_quantity, available_quantity, locked_quantity, in_transit_quantity, boxed_quantity, unboxed_quantity, system_warehouse_code, system_warehouse_name, system_sku, system_sku_name, customer_name, status, sync_batch_id, source_payload_json, source_payload_hash, first_seen_time, last_seen_time, update_time ) values ( #{connectionCode}, #{upstreamWarehouseCode}, #{upstreamWarehouseName}, #{masterSku}, #{masterProductName}, #{inventoryScope}, #{inventoryAttribute}, #{batchNo}, #{locationCode}, #{totalQuantity}, #{availableQuantity}, #{lockedQuantity}, #{inTransitQuantity}, #{boxedQuantity}, #{unboxedQuantity}, #{systemWarehouseCode}, #{systemWarehouseName}, #{systemSku}, #{systemSkuName}, #{customerName}, #{status}, #{syncBatchId}, #{sourcePayloadJson}, #{sourcePayloadHash}, sysdate(), sysdate(), sysdate() ) on duplicate key update upstream_warehouse_name = values(upstream_warehouse_name), master_product_name = values(master_product_name), total_quantity = values(total_quantity), available_quantity = values(available_quantity), locked_quantity = values(locked_quantity), in_transit_quantity = values(in_transit_quantity), boxed_quantity = values(boxed_quantity), unboxed_quantity = values(unboxed_quantity), system_warehouse_code = values(system_warehouse_code), system_warehouse_name = values(system_warehouse_name), system_sku = values(system_sku), system_sku_name = values(system_sku_name), customer_name = values(customer_name), status = values(status), sync_batch_id = values(sync_batch_id), source_payload_json = values(source_payload_json), source_payload_hash = values(source_payload_hash), last_seen_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.update: update upstream_system_sku_inventory_snapshot s left join upstream_system_connection c on c.connection_code = s.connection_code left join upstream_system_warehouse_pairing p on p.connection_code = s.connection_code and p.upstream_warehouse_code = s.upstream_warehouse_code and p.pairing_role = case when c.settlement_type = 'self-operated-receivable' then 'QUOTE' else 'FULFILLMENT' end and p.status = 'ACTIVE' set s.system_warehouse_code = coalesce(p.system_warehouse_code, ''), s.system_warehouse_name = coalesce(p.system_warehouse_name, ''), s.update_time = sysdate() where s.connection_code = #{connectionCode}

update upstream_system_sku_inventory_snapshot s left join upstream_system_sku_pairing p on p.connection_code = s.connection_code and p.master_sku = s.master_sku set s.system_sku = coalesce(p.system_sku, ''), s.system_sku_name = coalesce(p.system_sku_name, ''), s.customer_name = coalesce(p.customer_name, ''), s.update_time = sysdate() where s.connection_code = #{connectionCode}
mapper.insert: insert into upstream_system_inventory_sync_state( connection_code, status, sync_batch_id, last_started_time, last_finished_time, last_success_time, next_sync_time, total_count, active_count, missing_count, last_error_message, update_time ) values ( #{connectionCode}, #{status}, #{syncBatchId}, #{lastStartedTime}, #{lastFinishedTime}, #{lastSuccessTime}, #{nextSyncTime}, coalesce(#{totalCount}, 0), coalesce(#{activeCount}, 0), coalesce(#{missingCount}, 0), coalesce(#{lastErrorMessage}, ''), sysdate() ) on duplicate key update status = values(status), sync_batch_id = values(sync_batch_id), last_started_time = values(last_started_time), last_finished_time = values(last_finished_time), last_success_time = values(last_success_time), next_sync_time = values(next_sync_time), total_count = coalesce(values(total_count), total_count), active_count = coalesce(values(active_count), active_count), missing_count = coalesce(values(missing_count), missing_count), last_error_message = coalesce(values(last_error_message), ''), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select: select * from upstream_system_inventory_sync_state where connection_code = #{connectionCode} limit 1
select * from upstream_system_sku_pairing where connection_code = #{connectionCode} order by create_time desc, sku_pairing_id desc
